name: The Agent of Mystery - Earth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>秘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぴ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アース
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "The Agent of Mystery - Earth" or, if "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can add 1 "Master Hyperion" from your Deck to your hand instead.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "The Agent of Mystery - Earth" or, if "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can add 1 "Master Hyperion" from your Deck to your hand instead.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "The Agent of Mystery - Earth" or, if "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can add 1 "Master Hyperion" from your Deck to your hand instead.
